subcodes.first_line: O Ahmad! Thou hast indeed heard many Persian words from the tongue of Divine Unity, and hast quaffed from the chalices the Kawthar of wondrous meanings [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای احمد کلمات پارسیه از لسان احدیه بسیار شنیدی و کوثر معانی بدیعه از کئوس
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @chastisement and requital, @exhortations and counsels, @personal instructions
